questions.q: What’s the safest action when you see water covering the road?
choices: Turn around and find another route
questions.explain: Just 15–30 cm of moving water can sweep a car away.

questions.q: You should switch off electricity before evacuating if it’s safe to do so.
questions.explain: Cutting power reduces electrocution risk when water rises.

questions.q: Pick a *must have* for a flood go-bag:
questions.explain: Clean drinking water is critical after floods.
